understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; a level is only won when all goals are simultaneously covered, and the whole game is won by reaching WIN on the final level within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction unless blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects; some adjacent objects are pushable blocks that can be shoved along if space permits. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; control switches using CLICK on the exact pixel position of another selectable. Walls typically prevent movement, while the movement-blocked hints only indicate adjacency and don’t guarantee failure, so testing moves is sometimes required to learn object behavior.
